conceptClusters.title: Retained state and local evidence
exitEvidence: Learner ties browser observations to the correct local source, saved revision, and passing checkpoint.
Learner separates local processor, memory, storage, application, input, and output evidence from network claims.

conceptClusters.title: Connectivity and account safety
exitEvidence: Learner locates changed failures at the smallest supported device, network, provider, DNS, server, or request layer.
Learner rejects lookalike sign-in, secret sharing, shared administration, and weak recovery without exposing real credentials.

conceptClusters.title: Browser engines and updates
exitEvidence: Learner distinguishes browser brand, engine family, version, update source, platform support, and authentic-device gaps.
Learner plans official-distribution installation and bounded cross-engine testing without bundled or untrusted downloads.

conceptClusters.title: Browser site and navigation boundaries
exitEvidence: Learner distinguishes browser chrome, page, site, server, URL, origin, query, result, and destination.
Learner explains direct URL navigation and search intermediaries with bounded privacy claims.

conceptClusters.title: Query and evidence refinement
exitEvidence: Learner constrains and refines unfamiliar browser queries from observed ambiguity rather than adding words blindly.
Learner separates snippet, opened source, authority, date, version, tested behavior, and remaining uncertainty.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A worked local project opens in a simulated browser while revision, connectivity, account, engine, navigation, search, and evidence boundaries remain explicit.
activityDesigns.startingState: A saved passing local HTML project, browser simulator, fictional accounts, connectivity trace, engine matrix, and research notebook are synchronized.
activityDesigns.completionState: The learner predicts and explains ten browser and evidence contrasts without real credentials, unsafe downloads, or external claims beyond evidence.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback contrasts prediction with observed revision, local resource, network layer, sign-in surface, engine, URL, request, source, and uncertainty evidence.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Worked guidance reveals one boundary after prediction and uses fictional credentials and deterministic network and search traces.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss returns to a smaller parallel trace, requires a revised explanation, and checks one changed layer or source.

interactions.title: Retrieve browser artifact revision
interactions.learnerAction: Predict which source, saved project, preview, browser-loaded response, and passing checkpoint revision are currently aligned.
interactions.artifactChange: No load changes; five revision states are mapped.

evidence.observable: Every browser observation ties to correct saved source and evidence revision.
evidence.changedCase: Local file changes after browser load.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Stale loaded page treated as current source.
interactions.correctionRoute: Order save, request, response, render, and check events.

interactions.title: Separate local and network evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect local processor, memory, storage, browser process, network state, request, and output observations before diagnosing failure.
interactions.artifactChange: Evidence is labeled by local or network layer.

evidence.observable: Local observations remain distinct from connectivity and server claims.
evidence.changedCase: Browser process stalls while connectivity remains available.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Local process symptom called internet failure.
interactions.correctionRoute: Locate observation source before causal claim.

interactions.title: Locate smallest failure layer
interactions.learnerAction: Predict device, local-network, provider, internet, DNS, server, or browser-request layer from a changed evidence trace.
interactions.artifactChange: One bounded failure trace is classified.

evidence.observable: Diagnosis names smallest supported layer and unresolved administrator boundary.
evidence.changedCase: Wi-Fi stays connected while DNS fails.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Working Wi-Fi icon treated as complete web proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Check each layer in causal order.

interactions.title: Reject unsafe sign-in requests
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect official and lookalike sign-in surfaces, secret-sharing request, shared administrator account, recovery path, and update state.
interactions.artifactChange: Unsafe fictional choices are rejected with reasons.

evidence.observable: Decision preserves individual identity, least privilege, trusted surface, MFA, recovery, locking, updates, and no real secrets.
evidence.changedCase: Lookalike origin and urgency wording change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Long reused password or shared admin accepted.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify origin, identity, privilege, and recovery separately.

interactions.title: Plan browser coverage
interactions.learnerAction: Predict coverage from browser brands, rendering engines, versions, platforms, update sources, and assistive environments.
interactions.artifactChange: A fictional browser coverage matrix is planned.

evidence.observable: Plan distinguishes brand from engine and names unsupported authentic-device gaps.
evidence.changedCase: Two brands share one engine and one platform becomes unsupported.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Two Chromium brands counted as cross-engine coverage.
interactions.correctionRoute: Group browsers by engine and platform evidence.

interactions.title: Verify safe update source
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect fictional official distribution, bundled installer, version evidence, update status, platform support, and remaining device test.
interactions.artifactChange: A safe install-and-update decision is recorded.

evidence.observable: Decision uses official distribution, current supported version, no bundle, and explicit gaps.
evidence.changedCase: Official platform support ends for one browser.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Search advertisement or bundled installer trusted.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify publisher, distribution origin, version, and platform.

interactions.title: Label browser navigation boundaries
interactions.learnerAction: Label browser chrome, address field, full URL, origin, page, site, server request, search query, result, and destination.
interactions.artifactChange: A navigation trace receives ten labels.

evidence.observable: Application, intermediary, address, request, site, page, and destination remain distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Search result title differs from destination URL.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Address bar or result title called destination address.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace typed input through requests and final URL.

interactions.title: Contrast direct and search navigation
interactions.learnerAction: Predict requests, intermediaries, origins, history entries, and privacy limits for direct URL navigation and search-result navigation.
interactions.artifactChange: Two navigation paths are compared.

evidence.observable: Prediction separates direct destination request from query and search-result intermediary.
evidence.changedCase: Address field receives an invalid URL-like string.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Every address-field input treated as direct URL.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify input then trace each request.

interactions.title: Refine an ambiguous query
interactions.learnerAction: Predict how version, error phrase, platform, behavior, and excluded ambiguity change an unfamiliar web-development query.
interactions.artifactChange: An ambiguous query gains evidence-driven constraints.

evidence.observable: Refinement reduces named ambiguity without assuming more words are always better.
evidence.changedCase: Observed error and target version change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First broad query or longest query accepted.
interactions.correctionRoute: Add only terms tied to observed uncertainty.

interactions.title: Explain research evidence chain
interactions.learnerAction: Explain query, result snippet, opened source, authority, date, version, tested behavior, contradiction, and remaining uncertainty.
interactions.artifactChange: A complete research-evidence trace is recorded.

evidence.observable: Explanation separates discovery clue from opened authoritative and tested evidence.
evidence.changedCase: First result becomes stale and a current source disagrees.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Snippet or matching code treated as resolved claim.
interactions.correctionRoute: Open source, verify scope, test behavior, preserve uncertainty.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: An air-quality advisory page is verified in supported browsers and gains a safe reproducible research trace with explicit revision, connectivity, account, engine, navigation, and evidence boundaries.
activityDesigns.startingState: A saved local advisory project, fictional sign-in choices, deterministic network traces, browser matrix, navigation simulator, and research notebook are available.
activityDesigns.completionState: The learner distinguishes every browser and evidence layer, tests changed cases, exposes no credentials, and records remaining uncertainty and authentic-device gaps.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback reports observed revision, local resource, network, origin, account, version, engine, request, source, behavior, and uncertainty evidence.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Three hints move from boundary question, to evidence location, to unrelated mini-trace without revealing final diagnosis or query.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A failure requires revised prediction, smallest-layer correction, and a changed advisory trace before progression.

interactions.title: Inspect advisory revisions
interactions.learnerAction: Identify local source, saved project, browser-loaded response, rendered page, stale tab, and passing checkpoint revisions.
interactions.artifactChange: Six revision states receive explicit labels.

evidence.observable: Each browser observation maps to correct request and source revision.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Stale tab treated as current project.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace save, request, response, render, and check order.

interactions.title: Predict reload consequences
interactions.learnerAction: Predict browser page, network request, local file, saved source, and checkpoint after edit, save, failed request, and reload.
interactions.artifactChange: An event trace is predicted before execution.

evidence.observable: Prediction separates local persistence from browser request and check evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Save occurs after first reload.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Reload assumed to save or validate source.
interactions.correctionRoute: Mark which event reads or writes each state.

interactions.title: Test stale browser state
interactions.learnerAction: Change advisory source, withhold save, reload one tab, preserve another, and compare revision and DOM evidence.
interactions.artifactChange: Two tabs and local source intentionally diverge.

evidence.observable: Every tab, request, save, and DOM observation remains revision-bound.
evidence.changedCase: Saved edit replaces unsaved edit in parallel trace.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Evidence from one tab attributed to another.
interactions.correctionRoute: Match tab request time and source revision.

interactions.title: Inspect local resource observations
interactions.learnerAction: Label browser process, processor activity, memory, storage, input, output, network interface, and request observations.
interactions.artifactChange: Eight observations join an evidence-layer map.

evidence.observable: Local component observations remain distinct from network and server claims.
evidence.changedCase: Browser process hangs while network request never starts.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Local and remote evidence conflated.
interactions.correctionRoute: Identify where each observation was measured.

interactions.title: Predict local process failure
interactions.learnerAction: Predict source, saved bytes, browser tabs, and network requests after a browser process crash with normal connectivity.
interactions.artifactChange: A simulated browser process terminates.

evidence.observable: Prediction preserves files and separates process loss from internet loss.
evidence.changedCase: Editor process rather than browser process terminates.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Process crash called storage or internet failure.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace which process owned each volatile state.

interactions.title: Test local versus remote faults
interactions.learnerAction: Compare slow render, failed DNS, unavailable server, and missing local file using supplied local and request evidence.
interactions.artifactChange: Four controlled faults produce distinct traces.

evidence.observable: Diagnosis separates local application, storage, name resolution, and server evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Two symptoms occur together.

interactions.feedbackTarget: All browser failures called network failures.
interactions.correctionRoute: Find earliest failing observation in each trace.

interactions.title: Save verified browser evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Record current advisory source digest, browser version, request result, rendered revision, and passing checkpoint in notebook.
interactions.artifactChange: A revision-bound browser evidence record is saved.

evidence.observable: Reload restores record and all identifiers agree with current artifact.
evidence.changedCase: Source and browser version change independently.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Evidence saved without revision or environment identity.
interactions.correctionRoute: Bind each observation to artifact and environment.

interactions.title: Explain local evidence boundary
interactions.learnerAction: Explain which advisory observations prove local artifact behavior and which cannot prove connectivity or remote service behavior.
interactions.artifactChange: A bounded local-evidence explanation is recorded.

evidence.observable: Explanation ties claims to revision and measurement layer.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Local preview generalized to remote web behavior.
interactions.correctionRoute: State observation source and claim scope separately.

interactions.title: Predict connectivity-layer outcomes
interactions.learnerAction: Predict evidence for device, local network, provider, internet, DNS, server, and browser-request failures.
interactions.artifactChange: Seven layer traces are predicted.

evidence.observable: Each prediction names smallest layer and evidence limits.
evidence.changedCase: Wi-Fi remains connected through DNS and server failures.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Wi-Fi status treated as end-to-end proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Walk layers from device to requested resource.

interactions.title: Inspect air-quality request path
interactions.learnerAction: Trace device, local network, provider, internet route, DNS lookup, server, browser request, and subresource responses.
interactions.artifactChange: A complete request-layer trace is annotated.

evidence.observable: Every layer has distinct observation and unresolved boundary.
evidence.changedCase: Main page succeeds while one subresource fails.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Page success assumed to prove every resource.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace each request independently.

interactions.title: Diagnose changed network traces
interactions.learnerAction: Classify six changed advisory failures and state what requires authorized administrator or provider action.
interactions.artifactChange: Six diagnoses and escalation boundaries are recorded.

evidence.observable: Smallest supported layers and authorized next owners are correct.
evidence.changedCase: Two adjacent layers fail together.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Learner instructed to alter unauthorized network state.
interactions.correctionRoute: Stop at evidence and authorization boundary.

interactions.title: Explain bounded network diagnosis
interactions.learnerAction: Explain one advisory failure as observed layer, excluded layers, unresolved uncertainty, and authorized next action.
interactions.artifactChange: A causal network diagnosis is saved.

evidence.observable: Explanation stays within supplied evidence and authority.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Universal cause or unauthorized fix proposed.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate proof, exclusion, uncertainty, and ownership.

interactions.title: Identify trusted sign-in surface
interactions.learnerAction: Predict safe choice among official origin, lookalike origin, search advertisement, emailed link, and password-manager match evidence.
interactions.artifactChange: Five fictional sign-in choices are evaluated.

evidence.observable: Decision verifies origin and trusted route and enters no real credentials.
evidence.changedCase: Lookalike uses valid HTTPS and familiar branding.

interactions.feedbackTarget: HTTPS or visual branding accepted as identity proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify exact origin and trusted navigation route.

interactions.title: Inspect account boundary plan
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect unique identity, password manager, phishing-resistant MFA, least privilege, locking, updates, recovery, and no-secret collection.
interactions.artifactChange: A fictional account setup plan is annotated.

evidence.observable: Every safety boundary and recovery need has explicit evidence.
evidence.changedCase: MFA option and recovery device availability change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Shared administrator or reused password accepted.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate identity, credential, privilege, and recovery.

interactions.title: Reject account attack scenarios
interactions.learnerAction: Reject lookalike sign-in, secret-sharing request, shared admin, weak recovery, unlocked session, and delayed updates with reasons.
interactions.artifactChange: Six fictional safety decisions are recorded.

evidence.observable: Reasons preserve individual identity, least privilege, locking, updates, strong recovery, and no secrets.
evidence.changedCase: Urgency, branding, and requester role change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Authority or urgency overrides account boundary.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify request, origin, privilege, and recovery separately.

interactions.title: Explain safe fictional setup
interactions.learnerAction: Explain a fictional advisory account plan without soliciting real usernames, passwords, recovery codes, or personal data.
interactions.artifactChange: A privacy-preserving setup explanation is saved.

evidence.observable: Plan covers trusted origin, unique identity, credential generation, MFA, privilege, lock, updates, and recovery.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Real secret or personal data requested.
interactions.correctionRoute: Replace collection with fictional evidence fields.

interactions.title: Predict engine coverage gaps
interactions.learnerAction: Predict what two browser brands, engine families, versions, platforms, and assistive environments do and do not cover.
interactions.artifactChange: A candidate coverage matrix is predicted.

evidence.observable: Brands, engines, versions, platforms, and authentic gaps remain distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Two brands share engine and one engine changes platform support.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Brand count substituted for engine coverage.
interactions.correctionRoute: Group by engine and platform evidence.

interactions.title: Inspect browser version evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect browser brand, engine, version, update channel, official source, platform support, and current update status.
interactions.artifactChange: Environment evidence joins browser matrix.

evidence.observable: Current supported browser identity and update source are verified.
evidence.changedCase: Auto-update is paused and version becomes stale.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Brand name alone treated as current environment proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record version, engine, channel, source, and support.

interactions.title: Reject unsafe browser downloads
interactions.learnerAction: Evaluate official distribution, search advertisement, mirror, bundled installer, unsupported package, and unexpected publisher cases.
interactions.artifactChange: Six fictional download decisions are recorded.

evidence.observable: Only supported official distribution without unwanted bundle is accepted.
evidence.changedCase: Official source redirects to platform store.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Top search result or familiar logo trusted.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify official publisher, origin, support, and bundle.

interactions.title: Build advisory browser matrix
interactions.learnerAction: Record current fictional browsers by brand, engine, version, platform, update source, support, and remaining authentic tests.
interactions.artifactChange: A bounded cross-engine test matrix is saved.

evidence.observable: Matrix covers distinct engines and names device and assistive gaps.
evidence.changedCase: One browser loses platform support.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Duplicate engine coverage or unsupported target hidden.
interactions.correctionRoute: Deduplicate engines and expose every gap.

interactions.title: Test advisory across engines
interactions.learnerAction: Compare saved advisory source, DOM, behavior, console, and request evidence across fictional supported engine traces.
interactions.artifactChange: Cross-engine observations join evidence record.

evidence.observable: Every result is tied to version, engine, artifact revision, and test boundary.
evidence.changedCase: One engine trace exposes a request difference.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One passing browser generalized to all engines.
interactions.correctionRoute: Bind each observation to its environment.

interactions.title: Predict update-state effects
interactions.learnerAction: Predict evidence implications when browser version is current, stale, unsupported, or unavailable on target platform.
interactions.artifactChange: Four version-support states are evaluated.

evidence.observable: Prediction avoids attributing every difference to page source.
evidence.changedCase: Page revision and browser version change together.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Unsupported browser result treated as target requirement.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate environment support from artifact behavior.

interactions.title: Inspect authentic-device gaps
interactions.learnerAction: Identify which touch, composition, assistive-technology, platform, and engine tests are not proven by simulation.
interactions.artifactChange: A remaining-device test list is recorded.

evidence.observable: Unverified combinations remain explicit and safely scoped.
evidence.changedCase: A new target platform joins requirements.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Simulator matrix called complete device proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: List target combination and missing authentic observation.

interactions.title: Defend browser coverage plan
interactions.learnerAction: Explain official installation, updates, brand-engine distinctions, version evidence, cross-engine scope, and authentic-device gaps.
interactions.artifactChange: A browser-coverage defense is saved.

evidence.observable: Every claimed coverage dimension and gap is evidence-backed.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Browser count or market popularity used as proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Map each requirement to engine, platform, and evidence.

interactions.title: Label advisory browser trace
interactions.learnerAction: Label browser application, chrome, address field, URL, origin, page, site, server, request, query, result, and destination.
interactions.artifactChange: Twelve navigation entities receive labels.

evidence.observable: Every application, address, intermediary, resource, and destination is distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Result title differs from final page title and URL.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Browser, site, page, server, and search conflated.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace input through each request and origin.

interactions.title: Predict direct URL navigation
interactions.learnerAction: Predict address parsing, DNS, request, response, origin, history, and page result for a supplied direct URL.
interactions.artifactChange: A direct-navigation trace is predicted.

evidence.observable: Prediction contains no search-engine intermediary and names request layers.
evidence.changedCase: URL contains path, query, and fragment.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Address field automatically called search query.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify input syntax before request trace.

interactions.title: Predict search navigation
interactions.learnerAction: Predict query request, results page, result link, destination request, final URL, history, and privacy limits.
interactions.artifactChange: A search-mediated trace is predicted.

evidence.observable: Search query, result metadata, destination address, and final origin remain distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Result redirects to another origin.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Search-result title treated as destination URL.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect actual link and final address separately.

interactions.title: Compare direct and search requests
interactions.learnerAction: Run direct and search navigation traces to same advisory destination and compare intermediaries and request evidence.
interactions.artifactChange: Two navigation histories are recorded.

evidence.observable: Same destination is reached through distinct request and privacy paths.
evidence.changedCase: Destination moves and old search result becomes stale.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Equivalent final page assumed identical navigation exposure.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare every intermediary and request.

interactions.title: Inspect origin and lookalike address
interactions.learnerAction: Compare exact origins, subdomains, paths, HTTPS state, page branding, and password-manager match for official and lookalike pages.
interactions.artifactChange: Origin and page-identity evidence is annotated.

evidence.observable: Exact origin remains distinct from branding, path text, and result title.
evidence.changedCase: Lookalike uses valid certificate and nested familiar words.

interactions.feedbackTarget: HTTPS or branding accepted as official identity.
interactions.correctionRoute: Parse and compare exact origin.

interactions.title: Test address-field ambiguity
interactions.learnerAction: Classify URL, invalid URL-like text, search phrase, host name, path, and pasted result title before navigation.
interactions.artifactChange: Six address-field inputs receive predicted outcomes.

evidence.observable: Each input produces correct direct, search, or error pathway.
evidence.changedCase: Browser policy changes one ambiguous input outcome.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Every address-field string treated identically.
interactions.correctionRoute: Parse input then observe actual request.

interactions.title: Record reproducible navigation trace
interactions.learnerAction: Record typed input, interpreted action, intermediary, request URL, redirect, final origin, page title, timestamp, and privacy boundary.
interactions.artifactChange: A reproducible advisory navigation record is saved.

evidence.observable: Record reconstructs actual path without treating title as address.
evidence.changedCase: Destination redirects and page title changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Trace omits input interpretation or final URL.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record every transition in order.

interactions.title: Explain browser search boundaries
interactions.learnerAction: Explain browser application, site, page, server, URL, origin, direct navigation, query, result, destination, and privacy limits.
interactions.artifactChange: A boundary explanation joins workshop evidence.

evidence.observable: Every term maps to observed advisory navigation evidence.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Definitions repeated without trace evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Point to one observed entity per term.

interactions.title: Frame advisory research problem
interactions.learnerAction: Turn an unfamiliar browser discrepancy into behavior, engine, version, platform, error, scope, and excluded-ambiguity query terms.
interactions.artifactChange: A researchable question and first query are recorded.

evidence.observable: Query terms follow observed problem and preserve uncertainty.
evidence.changedCase: Observed error and platform change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Natural-language symptom copied without constraints.
interactions.correctionRoute: Name behavior, environment, and ambiguity.

interactions.title: Inspect search-result limitations
interactions.learnerAction: Compare result titles, snippets, URLs, authorities, dates, versions, and visible uncertainty before opening sources.
interactions.artifactChange: Candidate results receive provisional evidence labels.

evidence.observable: Snippets remain discovery clues and not claim proof.
evidence.changedCase: Top result is stale while lower official result is current.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First matching snippet accepted as answer.
interactions.correctionRoute: Open source and verify authority, date, version, scope.

interactions.title: Refine query from evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Predict which observed ambiguity, version mismatch, terminology, and excluded mechanism should change the query.
interactions.artifactChange: Second query is derived from opened evidence.

evidence.observable: Refinement removes ambiguity without irrelevant term accumulation.
evidence.changedCase: Official terminology differs from original symptom wording.

interactions.feedbackTarget: More words added without evidence reason.
interactions.correctionRoute: Add, replace, or remove one justified constraint.

interactions.title: Compare authority freshness scope
interactions.learnerAction: Evaluate official specification, vendor documentation, old blog, copied answer, result snippet, and observed browser behavior for one claim.
interactions.artifactChange: Six evidence sources receive role and limitation labels.

evidence.observable: Authority, freshness, version, scope, observation, and uncertainty remain distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Vendor documentation conflicts with stale blog.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Popularity or matching code substituted for authority.
interactions.correctionRoute: Match source role to exact claim.

interactions.title: Build advisory evidence record
interactions.learnerAction: Record query versions, opened URLs, authority, date, version, claim, limitation, tested behavior, contradiction, and uncertainty.
interactions.artifactChange: A reproducible research trail is saved.

evidence.observable: Every conclusion traces to opened and tested evidence tied to environment.
evidence.changedCase: Browser version updates and one claim changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Record contains snippets or links without claim mapping.
interactions.correctionRoute: Tie each claim to source, version, test, and limit.

interactions.title: Test research trail reproducibility
interactions.learnerAction: Re-run query, open recorded sources, reproduce browser test, compare versions, and identify changed or missing evidence.
interactions.artifactChange: Research record gains reproducibility status.

evidence.observable: Repeat distinguishes stable claim, changed source, environment drift, and remaining uncertainty.
evidence.changedCase: One source disappears and current official replacement is found.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Original conclusion retained after evidence drift.
interactions.correctionRoute: Refresh source, version, test, and uncertainty.

interactions.title: Run integrated browser mutations
interactions.learnerAction: Change source revision, local process, DNS layer, sign-in origin, engine version, navigation path, and evidence freshness while rerunning checks.
interactions.artifactChange: Seven coordinated mutations challenge advisory evidence.

evidence.observable: Every diagnosis, safety decision, coverage claim, navigation trace, and conclusion updates correctly.
evidence.changedCase: A second mutation set changes all values.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One changed layer leaves stale conclusions elsewhere.
interactions.correctionRoute: Repair evidence in causal dependency order.

interactions.title: Present advisory research trace
interactions.learnerAction: Save, reload, and defend revision truth, local resources, connectivity, account safety, browser coverage, navigation, query refinement, and uncertainty.
interactions.artifactChange: Advisory evidence becomes workshop completion checkpoint.

evidence.observable: Reloaded record supports every concept and changed case without real secrets.
evidence.changedCase: One final source and environment update is reverified.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Conclusion claimed from first result or single browser.
interactions.correctionRoute: Demonstrate weakest claim with parallel evidence trace.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A water-notice project is compared across browser, connectivity, account, navigation, and research evidence with fading support and no reuse of advisory traces.
activityDesigns.startingState: A saved water notice, partial browser matrix, fictional account prompts, changed navigation traces, and incomplete evidence notebook are provided.
activityDesigns.completionState: The learner independently verifies changed browser behavior, rejects unsafe choices, refines evidence, preserves uncertainty, and reloads the record.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback names observed boundary and unmet concept while withholding final diagnosis, browser matrix, navigation trace, or query.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints fade from evidence-location cues to learner-requested concept reminders and unrelated mini-traces.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires a smaller parallel water trace, revised evidence, and a different mutation before original task reopens.

interactions.title: Complete water revision trace
interactions.learnerAction: Complete source, save, request, response, tab, render, and checkpoint revisions after changed edit and reload events.
interactions.artifactChange: A seven-state revision trace becomes complete.

evidence.observable: Every browser observation maps to correct source revision.
evidence.changedCase: Save occurs after one tab reloads.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Stale tab evidence treated as current.
interactions.correctionRoute: Order each read and write event.

interactions.title: Test local resource distinction
interactions.learnerAction: Distinguish browser process, memory, storage, input, output, request, DNS, and server observations across four water faults.
interactions.artifactChange: Four faults receive local or network evidence labels.

evidence.observable: Local component evidence remains separate from remote layer claims.
evidence.changedCase: Two symptoms occur together.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Every browser symptom called internet failure.
interactions.correctionRoute: Locate measurement source for each observation.

interactions.title: Explain bounded water evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Explain what current local source, process, request, and rendered evidence proves and what remains unverified.
interactions.artifactChange: A bounded evidence explanation is recorded.

evidence.observable: Every claim names revision and measurement layer.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Local behavior overgeneralized to remote service.
interactions.correctionRoute: State observation and claim scope separately.

interactions.title: Complete layer diagnoses
interactions.learnerAction: Complete device, local-network, provider, internet, DNS, server, and browser-request diagnoses and authorized escalation boundaries.
interactions.artifactChange: Seven changed network cases become diagnosed.

evidence.observable: Smallest supported layer and uncertainty are correct.
evidence.changedCase: Wi-Fi remains active through DNS and server failures.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Working local network called end-to-end proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Walk causal layers in order.

interactions.title: Test water account decisions
interactions.learnerAction: Reject lookalike origin, shared administrator, secret request, weak recovery, unlocked session, and stale updates with reasons.
interactions.artifactChange: Six fictional account decisions are recorded.

evidence.observable: Identity, origin, credential, MFA, privilege, lock, update, and recovery boundaries pass.
evidence.changedCase: Urgency and branding change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: HTTPS, authority, or urgency overrides exact origin.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify each safety boundary independently.

interactions.title: Explain safe fictional account plan
interactions.learnerAction: Explain trusted navigation, unique identity, password manager, phishing-resistant MFA, least privilege, locking, updates, recovery, and no real secrets.
interactions.artifactChange: A safe setup and escalation explanation is saved.

evidence.observable: Plan preserves account and network authority boundaries.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Real credential collection or unauthorized network action.
interactions.correctionRoute: Replace with fictional evidence and authorized owner.

interactions.title: Complete water browser matrix
interactions.learnerAction: Complete brand, engine, version, platform, official source, update status, support, and authentic-device gaps.
interactions.artifactChange: A browser coverage matrix becomes complete.

evidence.observable: Distinct engines and explicit unsupported combinations are recorded.
evidence.changedCase: Two brands share engine and platform support changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Browser brand count substituted for engine coverage.
interactions.correctionRoute: Group environments by engine and platform.

interactions.title: Test install update and coverage
interactions.learnerAction: Evaluate official, bundled, mirror, stale, unsupported, and cross-engine cases and verify fictional water behavior traces.
interactions.artifactChange: Six environment decisions and results are tested.

evidence.observable: Safe source, version, support, engine, and test scope pass.
evidence.changedCase: One browser loses support and another updates.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Search result or duplicate engine treated as safe coverage.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify publisher, version, support, and engine.

interactions.title: Defend water coverage limits
interactions.learnerAction: Defend browser choices and name touch, composition, assistive, engine, platform, and authentic-device evidence still missing.
interactions.artifactChange: A bounded coverage defense is recorded.

evidence.observable: Claims and remaining gaps map to exact environments.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Simulator results called complete device coverage.
interactions.correctionRoute: List target combination and missing observation.

interactions.title: Complete navigation labels
interactions.learnerAction: Complete browser, chrome, input, URL, origin, page, site, server, query, result, redirect, and destination labels.
interactions.artifactChange: A twelve-part water navigation trace becomes complete.

evidence.observable: Every application, intermediary, request, and destination remains distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Result title and final origin change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Result title or address field called destination.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace input and requests in order.

interactions.title: Test direct and search paths
interactions.learnerAction: Navigate to same water notice directly and through search, then compare requests, intermediaries, final origin, history, and privacy limits.
interactions.artifactChange: Two reproducible navigation histories are saved.

evidence.observable: Same destination has distinct navigation exposure and identity evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Search result redirects to new origin.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Same final page assumed same request path.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare every intermediary and final address.

interactions.title: Explain navigation and origin safety
interactions.learnerAction: Explain direct URL, search query, result metadata, exact origin, redirect, destination, and fictional sign-in boundary.
interactions.artifactChange: A navigation-safety explanation is recorded.

evidence.observable: Every term maps to observed water trace and exact origin.

interactions.feedbackTarget: HTTPS or branding used as origin proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Parse exact origin and navigation history.

interactions.title: Complete water query refinement
interactions.learnerAction: Complete problem statement, initial query, ambiguity, changed terms, opened authorities, dates, versions, tests, and uncertainty.
interactions.artifactChange: A research trail becomes complete.

evidence.observable: Each refinement follows observed evidence and scoped uncertainty.
evidence.changedCase: Browser version and error phrase change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: More words or first result accepted without reason.
interactions.correctionRoute: Change only terms tied to ambiguity.

interactions.title: Test authority freshness and behavior
interactions.learnerAction: Compare snippet, official specification, vendor docs, old blog, copied answer, and observed browser behavior for one water claim.
interactions.artifactChange: Six evidence roles and limitations are recorded.

evidence.observable: Authority, freshness, version, scope, behavior, contradiction, and uncertainty remain distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Current official source contradicts stale article.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Popularity or snippet treated as claim proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Match source role to exact claim.

interactions.title: Present water evidence trail
interactions.learnerAction: Save, reload, and explain revision, local resources, connectivity, account safety, browser coverage, navigation, queries, tested behavior, and uncertainty.
interactions.artifactChange: Water notice evidence becomes faded-practice checkpoint.

evidence.observable: Reloaded record supports every concept without real secrets.
evidence.changedCase: One source and environment update is reverified.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Conclusion claimed from first result or one browser.
interactions.correctionRoute: Demonstrate weakest claim with parallel trace.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A lookalike sign-in incident is investigated from revision, local resource, connectivity, origin, account, engine, navigation, and research evidence without entering secrets.
activityDesigns.startingState: A fictional user sees a branded sign-in result after a redirect while one browser is stale and connectivity traces are incomplete.
activityDesigns.completionState: The learner identifies the exact unsafe boundary, records a safe response, corrects stale conclusions, and verifies a changed incident.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback exposes earliest contradictory observation and asks for causal hypothesis before concept cues.
activityDesigns.hintContract: On-request hints point to revision, layer, origin, version, or source evidence and never ask for credentials.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Every repair must reject the original trap and a different lookalike, redirect, or account-recovery mutation.

interactions.title: Separate incident revisions
interactions.learnerAction: Identify saved project, loaded page, redirect history, browser version, stale tab, and passing checkpoint revisions.
interactions.artifactChange: Incident observations receive revision labels.

evidence.observable: Every claim is bound to current artifact and browser environment.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Stale tab or version evidence treated as current.
interactions.correctionRoute: Order requests, redirects, updates, and checks.

interactions.title: Exclude local resource causes
interactions.learnerAction: Predict which local processor, memory, storage, browser-process, input, and output evidence could or could not explain lookalike origin.
interactions.artifactChange: Unsupported local causes are excluded.

evidence.observable: Diagnosis separates local health from navigation identity.
evidence.changedCase: Browser process stalls after redirect.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Security identity problem blamed on hardware.
interactions.correctionRoute: Match symptom to observation layer.

interactions.title: Trace connectivity without overclaim
interactions.learnerAction: Trace device through browser request and distinguish successful connectivity from trustworthy destination identity.
interactions.artifactChange: Connectivity and identity evidence are separated.

evidence.observable: Successful requests do not certify sign-in origin.
evidence.changedCase: DNS failure replaces successful lookalike response.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Reachable HTTPS page called trusted account surface.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate delivery success from destination identity.

interactions.title: Reject and contain lookalike sign-in
interactions.learnerAction: Reject fictional credential entry, close unsafe flow, preserve evidence, navigate through trusted route, and choose safe recovery.
interactions.artifactChange: A safe incident response is recorded without secrets.

evidence.observable: Exact origin, individual identity, MFA, least privilege, recovery, locking, and updates pass.
evidence.changedCase: Lookalike uses valid HTTPS and changed urgency.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Credentials entered or link reused because branding matches.
interactions.correctionRoute: Stop entry and navigate from trusted origin.

interactions.title: Inspect stale browser evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Compare brand, engine, version, update source, support, and incident behavior without attributing origin deception to engine difference.
interactions.artifactChange: Environment and security causes are separated.

evidence.observable: Stale version is recorded as risk but exact origin remains decisive.
evidence.changedCase: Current second engine reproduces lookalike page.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Browser update treated as identity verification.
interactions.correctionRoute: Update safely and still verify exact origin.

interactions.title: Verify safe browser update path
interactions.learnerAction: Reject bundled and advertised installers, select official supported update source, and record remaining engine and device gaps.
interactions.artifactChange: A fictional safe update and test plan is saved.

evidence.observable: Publisher, source, version, support, engine, and gap evidence pass.
evidence.changedCase: Platform support ends for one browser.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Top result or familiar logo trusted.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify official publisher and support source.

interactions.title: Reconstruct redirect navigation
interactions.learnerAction: Predict typed input, search intermediary, result link, redirects, origins, final URL, page title, and sign-in surface.
interactions.artifactChange: An intended incident navigation trace is recorded.

evidence.observable: Every redirect and origin is distinct from branding and title.
evidence.changedCase: Lookalike adds official name in path and subdomain.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Result title or HTTPS treated as official origin.
interactions.correctionRoute: Parse exact origin at every redirect.

interactions.title: Repair trusted navigation path
interactions.learnerAction: Replace unsafe search-result route with direct trusted navigation and verify final origin, requests, and privacy intermediaries.
interactions.artifactChange: A safe reproducible navigation record replaces unsafe path.

evidence.observable: Direct route reaches exact trusted origin without unsafe intermediary.
evidence.changedCase: Trusted site redirects within approved origin boundary.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Unsafe bookmark or result link retained.
interactions.correctionRoute: Start from independently verified trusted address.

interactions.title: Audit misleading search evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect query, advertised result, snippet, lookalike URL, opened source, authority, date, version, behavior, and uncertainty.
interactions.artifactChange: Misleading evidence chain is annotated.

evidence.observable: Discovery metadata remains distinct from trustworthy opened evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Top result changes and stale source ranks first.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Ranking or snippet accepted as authority.
interactions.correctionRoute: Open and verify exact source, authority, and scope.

interactions.title: Write lookalike incident report
interactions.learnerAction: Save, reload, and explain revision, local evidence, connectivity, unsafe account choice, browser update, redirects, source verification, correction, and uncertainty.
interactions.artifactChange: Safe incident report becomes clinic checkpoint.

evidence.observable: Reloaded report supports every diagnosis without real secrets.
evidence.changedCase: A parallel lookalike incident is rejected.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Report lists actions without causal origin evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rewrite weakest claim as evidence, risk, action, result.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: An independent public-meeting evidence packet verifies a local page and external claims through safe browser, account, navigation, engine, query, source, behavior, and uncertainty evidence.
activityDesigns.startingState: A saved meeting page, fictional account choices, changed connectivity traces, browser candidates, search results, and an empty notebook are provided.
activityDesigns.completionState: The learner submits a revision-bound, credential-free, cross-engine, reproducible evidence packet and defends every limit and authentic-device gap.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Checks expose observed evidence and unmet competencies without revealing final diagnosis, trusted route, browser matrix, query, or source choice.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Optional hints ask boundary and evidence questions; no hint requests credentials or supplies a conclusion.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires learner diagnosis, safe correction, and different meeting-source or environment mutation before resubmission.

interactions.title: Bind meeting artifact evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Record saved source, digest, loaded response, rendered revision, browser environment, and passing checkpoint before research.
interactions.artifactChange: A revision-bound local evidence record is saved.

evidence.observable: Reload restores identifiers tied to current artifact and environment.
evidence.changedCase: Source changes after first browser load.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Research begins from stale artifact evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rebind observations to current saved revision.

interactions.title: Separate local meeting faults
interactions.learnerAction: Diagnose browser process, memory, storage, local file, request, DNS, and server faults using supplied observations.
interactions.artifactChange: Seven faults receive bounded evidence labels.

evidence.observable: Local and remote layers remain distinct and uncertainty is explicit.
evidence.changedCase: Two independent symptoms overlap in one trace.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Every browser fault called connectivity failure.
interactions.correctionRoute: Locate each observation source.

interactions.title: Defend local evidence scope
interactions.learnerAction: Defend what local source, process, storage, request, render, and checkpoint evidence proves and cannot prove.
interactions.artifactChange: A scoped local-evidence defense joins packet.

evidence.observable: Every claim maps to revision and measurement layer.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Local preview generalized to remote or other browser behavior.
interactions.correctionRoute: State claim scope beside observation.

interactions.title: Diagnose meeting connectivity layers
interactions.learnerAction: Classify device, local network, provider, internet, DNS, server, main-request, and subresource failures and authorized owners.
interactions.artifactChange: Eight diagnoses join evidence packet.

evidence.observable: Smallest supported layer, exclusions, uncertainty, and authorized action are correct.
evidence.changedCase: Main page succeeds while agenda file fails.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Wi-Fi icon or page load treated as all-resource proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace every request separately.

interactions.title: Create safe fictional account plan
interactions.learnerAction: Design unique identity, trusted navigation, password-manager credential, phishing-resistant MFA, least privilege, locking, updates, and recovery without real secrets.
interactions.artifactChange: A fictional credential-free account plan is saved.

evidence.observable: Every account and privacy boundary passes.
evidence.changedCase: MFA and recovery availability change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Shared admin or real credential collection.
interactions.correctionRoute: Use fictional evidence and individual least privilege.

interactions.title: Defend sign-in and escalation safety
interactions.learnerAction: Defend rejection of lookalike, shared-admin, secret-sharing, and unauthorized network actions using exact evidence.
interactions.artifactChange: A security and authority defense joins packet.

evidence.observable: Origin, identity, privilege, recovery, evidence, and authorized owner support decisions.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Authority, urgency, or branding overrides boundaries.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify exact request and permission.

interactions.title: Design meeting browser matrix
interactions.learnerAction: Select supported current browser brands and engines with versions, official update sources, platforms, and authentic-device gaps.
interactions.artifactChange: A learner-authored coverage matrix is saved.

evidence.observable: Distinct engines, safe sources, supported versions, and gaps satisfy brief.
evidence.changedCase: One browser loses platform support.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Duplicate engine brands counted as broad coverage.
interactions.correctionRoute: Map each target to engine and platform.

interactions.title: Test meeting page across engines
interactions.learnerAction: Compare DOM, behavior, requests, console, and revision evidence across fictional current engine traces.
interactions.artifactChange: Cross-engine test evidence joins packet.

evidence.observable: Every result binds to exact engine, version, platform, and artifact revision.
evidence.changedCase: One engine and source revision change together.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One passing browser generalized to all targets.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate each environment and artifact revision.

interactions.title: Defend browser evidence limits
interactions.learnerAction: Defend official install, update, engine scope, version evidence, and remaining touch, composition, assistive, and device gaps.
interactions.artifactChange: A coverage-limit defense joins packet.

evidence.observable: Claims and gaps map to exact tested combinations.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Simulator or brand count called complete coverage.
interactions.correctionRoute: Name missing target and observation.

interactions.title: Record meeting navigation paths
interactions.learnerAction: Record direct URL and search-mediated paths with input, query, result, redirects, requests, origins, final page, history, and privacy limits.
interactions.artifactChange: Two reproducible navigation records join packet.

evidence.observable: Browser, site, page, server, address, intermediary, and destination remain distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Result redirects to changed origin.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Result title or HTTPS treated as destination identity.
interactions.correctionRoute: Parse exact origin and trace requests.

interactions.title: Test address and origin cases
interactions.learnerAction: Classify URL, query, invalid URL-like text, result title, lookalike subdomain, and trusted redirect before navigation.
interactions.artifactChange: Six navigation predictions are tested.

evidence.observable: Each input and final origin produce correct route and safety decision.
evidence.changedCase: Browser policy changes ambiguous input.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Address field or branding used as identity proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify input and exact origin separately.

interactions.title: Defend navigation privacy boundary
interactions.learnerAction: Defend direct and search navigation choices, intermediaries, exact origins, history, redirects, and bounded privacy claims.
interactions.artifactChange: A navigation defense joins packet.

evidence.observable: Every navigation and privacy claim cites observed requests and origins.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Same destination assumed same exposure.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare all intermediaries and requests.

interactions.title: Build meeting research trail
interactions.learnerAction: Frame problem, write and refine queries, open sources, record authority, date, version, claim, limitation, tested behavior, contradiction, and uncertainty.
interactions.artifactChange: A reproducible research trail joins packet.

evidence.observable: Every conclusion maps to opened current source and environment-bound test.
evidence.changedCase: Error phrase and browser version change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Snippet, first result, or matching code treated as proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify source, scope, version, test, and limit.

interactions.title: Refresh changed evidence trail
interactions.learnerAction: Re-run queries and tests after source disappearance, stale article, browser update, and contradictory official evidence.
interactions.artifactChange: Packet records refreshed conclusions and uncertainty.

evidence.observable: Evidence drift updates source, version, behavior, claim, and limits.
evidence.changedCase: A new official source supersedes earlier guidance.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Original conclusion retained after evidence changes.
interactions.correctionRoute: Refresh every dependent claim and test.

interactions.title: Submit public-meeting packet
interactions.learnerAction: Save, reload, and defend revision, local evidence, layers, accounts, browser coverage, navigation, query choices, sources, tests, uncertainty, and gaps.
interactions.artifactChange: Meeting packet becomes independent-lab submission.

evidence.observable: Reloaded packet supports every claim and limit without credentials.
evidence.changedCase: A final environment and source change is reverified.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Packet claimed complete from link count or browser count.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reopen weakest claim with parallel evidence.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A retrieve-first set reconnects revision truth, local resources, network layers, account safety, browsers, navigation, search evidence, correction, and delayed review.
activityDesigns.startingState: No completed packet is visible; unfamiliar revision, resource, network, sign-in, browser, navigation, and source traces appear independently.
activityDesigns.completionState: Every concept has committed retrieval, correction, parallel success, and adaptive delayed-review evidence.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback follows commitment and contrasts response with observed revision, layer, origin, version, request, source, behavior, and uncertainty evidence.
activityDesigns.hintContract: No pre-response hints; post-response support offers only concept cue or smaller parallel trace.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Every miss requires causal explanation, different parallel item, and delayed reappearance; rereading cannot close review.

interactions.title: Retrieve browser revision states
interactions.learnerAction: Map source, save, request, response, tab, render, and checkpoint revisions in an unfamiliar trace.
interactions.artifactChange: A committed revision map is recorded.

evidence.observable: Every browser observation maps to correct artifact revision.
evidence.changedCase: Save and reload order changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Stale browser evidence treated as current.
interactions.correctionRoute: Complete a parallel event trace.

interactions.title: Retrieve local resource boundaries
interactions.learnerAction: Predict effects of browser crash, memory pressure, low storage, missing local file, DNS failure, and server failure.
interactions.artifactChange: Six predictions are committed.

evidence.observable: Local and network evidence remain distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Two independent symptoms overlap in one trace.

interactions.feedbackTarget: All browser failures called internet failure.
interactions.correctionRoute: Locate measurement source first.

interactions.title: Retrieve network layers
interactions.learnerAction: Classify device, local-network, provider, internet, DNS, server, browser-request, and subresource failures and authorized owners.
interactions.artifactChange: Eight diagnoses are committed.

evidence.observable: Smallest supported layer and uncertainty are correct.
evidence.changedCase: Wi-Fi remains active through changed failures.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One status icon treated as end-to-end proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Walk layers in causal order.

interactions.title: Retrieve account safety decisions
interactions.learnerAction: Reject lookalike origin, secret request, shared admin, reused credential, weak recovery, unlocked session, and stale updates.
interactions.artifactChange: Seven safety decisions are committed.

evidence.observable: Exact origin, individual identity, least privilege, MFA, locking, updates, recovery, and no secrets pass.
evidence.changedCase: Branding and urgency change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Authority or HTTPS overrides origin evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify every boundary separately.

interactions.title: Retrieve browser coverage evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Classify brand, engine, version, platform, update source, support, and authentic-device gaps across unfamiliar browsers.
interactions.artifactChange: A coverage matrix is committed.

evidence.observable: Distinct engine coverage and remaining gaps are accurate.
evidence.changedCase: Two brands share engine and support changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Brand count used as engine proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Group by engine and platform.

interactions.title: Correct unsafe update plan
interactions.learnerAction: Replace advertised, bundled, mirror, stale, or unsupported browser choices with official supported evidence and explicit gaps.
interactions.artifactChange: A safe fictional update plan is committed.

evidence.observable: Publisher, source, version, engine, support, and gaps pass.
evidence.changedCase: Official platform support changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Top result or familiar logo trusted.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify official source and platform support.

interactions.title: Retrieve browser and web boundaries
interactions.learnerAction: Label browser, chrome, input, URL, origin, page, site, server, query, result, redirect, and destination.
interactions.artifactChange: Twelve labels are committed.

evidence.observable: Every application, address, intermediary, and resource remains distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Result title and destination origin change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Result title or address field called destination.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace input and requests in order.

interactions.title: Retrieve direct versus search navigation
interactions.learnerAction: Predict requests, origins, history, redirects, intermediaries, and privacy limits for direct and search paths.
interactions.artifactChange: Two path predictions are committed.

evidence.observable: Same destination retains distinct navigation exposure.
evidence.changedCase: Search result becomes stale and redirects.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Same final page assumed same path.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare every intermediary and origin.

interactions.title: Retrieve query refinement
interactions.learnerAction: Frame unfamiliar problem, choose constrained terms, exclude ambiguity, compare results, and refine from opened evidence.
interactions.artifactChange: A two-query evidence chain is committed.

evidence.observable: Every term change follows observed ambiguity or terminology.
evidence.changedCase: Version and error phrase change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Longest query or first result accepted.
interactions.correctionRoute: Change one evidence-justified term.

interactions.title: Correct weak evidence chain
interactions.learnerAction: Replace snippet, stale blog, copied answer, and unbound test claims with opened authority, date, version, behavior, limitation, and uncertainty.
interactions.artifactChange: A corrected research trail is committed.

evidence.observable: Every conclusion maps to current source and environment-bound test.
evidence.changedCase: One source disappears and replacement differs.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Popularity or matching code treated as proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify exact claim, source, version, and behavior.

interactions.title: Explain correction and schedule retrieval
interactions.learnerAction: Explain weakest misconception, parallel correction, security boundary, remaining uncertainty, and next delayed retrieval target.
interactions.artifactChange: Correction and adaptive due concepts are persisted.

evidence.observable: Review links miss, correction, parallel success, safety, uncertainty, and due target.
evidence.changedCase: Later retrieval must succeed without this set.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Exposure counted as corrected retention.
interactions.correctionRoute: Keep concept due until parallel success.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A secure web-evidence bank samples revision truth, local resources, layer diagnosis, account safety, browser coverage, navigation, query refinement, source evaluation, correction, and defense.
activityDesigns.startingState: No hints, credentials, instructional artifacts, trusted route, browser matrix, canonical query, or correctness feedback is visible during scoring.
activityDesigns.completionState: Server-canonical evidence records competency results and routes misses to different safe remediation and secured reassessment items.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Only receipt is shown while scoring; afterward feedback names observed evidence and competency without canonical decisions or queries.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints are unavailable; requesting instruction exits scoring and exposes no real account or network state.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Every miss requires a smaller model, faded parallel task, safe correction, and different secured item before evidence can update.

interactions.title: Analyze browser revision truth

evidence.observable: Every observation maps to current artifact and environment.
evidence.changedCase: Parallel form changes save and reload order.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Stale evidence attributed to current source.
interactions.correctionRoute: Route to new revision-event model.

interactions.correctionRoute: Route to new query-refinement task.

interactions.title: Repair weak evidence record
interactions.learnerAction: Replace snippet, stale source, copied answer, and unbound behavior claim with authority, date, version, scope, test, limit, and uncertainty.
interactions.artifactChange: A scored corrected research record is submitted.

evidence.observable: Every conclusion maps to current opened source and environment-bound test.
evidence.changedCase: Server removes one source and changes official guidance.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Popularity or matching code treated as proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Route to different evidence-repair task.

interactions.title: Defend independent web evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Defend revision, resources, layers, account safety, browser coverage, navigation, query, authority, tested behavior, uncertainty, and evidence limits.
interactions.artifactChange: A scored evidence defense closes performance attempt.

evidence.observable: Every competency claim cites correction, changed case, and honest limit.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Mastery claimed from links, results, or browser count.
interactions.correctionRoute: Route unsupported claims to parallel evidence tasks.

authorshipBoundary.interpretation: This artifact fixes interaction intent and evidence before authoring; it is neither publishable learner content nor a source for automatic prose generation.

gaps: Independent subject, instructional-design, assessment, accessibility, privacy, security, and duplication reviews are not yet complete.
Learner-facing copy, fictional account states, deterministic traces, canonical answers, executable checks, authentic-device verification, and learner pilots remain unauthored.
